---
title: "Stretching"
---

# Stretching

Calendario stretching, focus corporeo e mobilità percepita.

## Log stretching

| Data | Durata min | Focus | Mobilità 1–5 | Note |
| --- | ---: | --- | ---: | --- |
| 2026-06-19 | 20 | hips hamstrings | 3 | Primo test stretching |

## Minuti per seduta

20 minuti registrati in una singola seduta il 2026-06-19.

## Mobilità percepita

Mobilità percepita media: 3/5.

## Riepilogo giornaliero

| Data | Sedute | Minuti | Mobilità media | Focus |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | --- |
| 2026-05-21 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-22 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-23 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-24 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-25 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-26 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-27 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-28 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-29 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-30 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-05-31 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-01 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-02 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-03 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-04 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-05 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-06 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-07 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-08 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-09 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-10 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-11 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-12 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-13 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-14 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-15 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-16 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-17 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-18 | 0 | 0 |  |  |
| 2026-06-19 | 1 | 20 | 3.0 | hips hamstrings |
